Homepage.Own_a_transparent_ticket_to_worthwhile_e: Own a transparent ticket to worthwhile experiences
Homepage.EvoTicket_combines_modern_authentication: EvoTicket combines modern authentication technology and intuitive digital experience to help users buy tickets with peace of mind, manage ownership clearly and discover more suitable events
Homepage.no_conferences_and_workshops_events: No conferences and workshops events yet.

Events.no_events_desc: Try changing your filters or search keywords.

Booking.booking_subtitle: Complete the 3-step process to own your ticket
Booking.booking_warning: Please complete the steps within the holding time to avoid losing your selected tickets.
Booking.select_showtime_warning: Please select a showtime before choosing seats.
Booking.seat_selection_hint: Click on a seat to select. You can select up to 4 seats.
Booking.booking_note_1: Your tickets are temporarily held during the countdown time
Booking.booking_note_2: The maximum number of tickets depends on the ticket type and event regulations
Booking.booking_note_3: This event does not support specific seat selection; tickets will be determined by the selected ticket type
Booking.change_showtime_subtitle: You are changing the showtime for the current booking.
Booking.change_showtime_warning: When confirming, you will lose the selected tickets from the current showtime. Continue?
Booking.timeout_message: Your booking timeout has ended. Please try booking again.
Booking.payment_method_note: Select a method to continue payment through the secure payment gateway.

Payment.email_note: Email used for transaction confirmation and electronic ticket info.
Payment.wallet_note: After successful payment, tickets will be updated in your Ticket Wallet.
Payment.discount_note: Valid codes will be applied directly to the total payment.
Payment.payment_method_desc: Select a method to continue payment via secure payment gateway.
Payment.payment_note: You will be redirected to the payment gateway to complete the transaction. The ticket holding time continues to run during this process.
Payment.before_note_1: Tickets/seats are only held during the countdown time at the top
Payment.before_note_2: Do not close the page or go back for too long during payment
Payment.before_note_3: If the transaction is not completed before timeout, the order may be cancelled
Payment.before_note_4: Please double-check the buyer information before continuing
Payment.after_note_1: Electronic tickets will appear in your Ticket Wallet
Payment.after_note_2: A transaction confirmation email will be sent to the provided email address
Payment.after_note_3: Each ticket has a unique code and will be ready for use according to system status
Payment.after_note_4: You can view ticket details in your account immediately after the transaction is complete
Payment.confirm_check: I confirm that I have checked the buyer information and selected tickets correctly
Payment.confirm_time: I understand that the ticket holding time continues to run during payment
Payment.confirm_terms: I agree with the transaction terms and EvoTicket support policy
Payment.terms_agree_note: By clicking "Pay Now", you agree to the {link}.
Payment.error_fullname_invalid: Full name must be at least 2 characters
Payment.error_booking_session_not_found: Booking session expired or does not exist

Result.success_desc: Your order has been confirmed. Tickets will appear in your Wallet as soon as the system completes issuance.
Result.nft_issuing_note: NFT ticket is being issued in the background. You can still track the status in My Wallet.
Result.pending_desc: We are checking results from the payment gateway. Please do not close the page while the system confirms the transaction.
Result.auto_update_note: The system will automatically update when there are results.
Result.failed_desc: Your transaction has not been completed. You can try again using the current method or choose another method.
Result.failed_note: If your account has been charged but the status still reports failure, please check your order history or contact support.
Result.expired_desc: The ticket holding time ended before the transaction was confirmed. Tickets/seats have been released and you need to select again to continue.
Result.expired_note: If you have successfully paid at the bank but this screen still appears, please contact support with the order code.
Result.cancelled_desc: The transaction was not performed. You can still return to continue payment if the ticket holding time is still valid.
Result.not_found_desc: Sorry, we could not find information for this order or the booking session has been cancelled.
Result.suggestion_1: Check the order code in the confirmation email.
Result.suggestion_2: If you just paid, please wait a few minutes and refresh the page.
Result.suggestion_3: Contact customer support if you need assistance.

EventDetail.event_not_found_desc: The link you accessed no longer exists, has been changed, or the event is not available on the system.
EventDetail.see_more_from_org: See more events from this organizer
EventDetail.schedule_note: Please select a schedule before proceeding to book tickets.
EventDetail.seat_selection_next_step: You will select the exact seat position in the next step.
EventDetail.attendance_note_1: Audience should arrive at least 30 minutes before showtime
EventDetail.attendance_note_2: Seats are confirmed by ticket code after successful payment
EventDetail.attendance_note_3: Please check the correct area and seat number before entering
EventDetail.attendance_note_4: Each ticket is valid for exactly one seat
EventDetail.organizer_desc_default: Organizer of professional performing arts programs.

Resale.page_subtitle: Find official resale tickets with transparent pricing and verified ownership.
Resale.page_description: Tickets here are listed via EvoTicket's official marketplace and comply with the system's resale regulations.
Resale.empty_subtitle: There are currently no resale tickets matching your criteria. Try loosening your filters or check back later.
Resale.banner_text: Buying resale tickets on EvoTicket helps you avoid fake tickets, verify origins, and gain transparent ownership after transactions.

ResaleCheckout.page_subtitle: Review your information and choose a payment method before completing the transaction.
ResaleCheckout.page_description: Transaction is conducted via EvoTicket's official resale marketplace.
ResaleCheckout.email_note: Email used for transaction confirmation and electronic ticket info.
ResaleCheckout.wallet_note: After successful payment, tickets will be updated in your Ticket Wallet.
ResaleCheckout.discount_note: Valid codes will be applied directly to the total payment.
ResaleCheckout.payment_method_desc: Select a method to continue payment via secure payment gateway.
ResaleCheckout.payment_note: You will be redirected to the payment gateway to complete the transaction. The ticket holding time continues to run during this process.
ResaleCheckout.before_note_1: Tickets/seats are only held during the countdown time at the top
ResaleCheckout.before_note_2: Do not close the page or go back for too long during payment
ResaleCheckout.before_note_3: If the transaction is not completed before timeout, the order may be cancelled
ResaleCheckout.before_note_4: Please double-check the buyer information before continuing
ResaleCheckout.after_note_1: Resale ticket will appear in your Ticket Wallet
ResaleCheckout.after_note_2: Ticket ownership is updated immediately in the system
ResaleCheckout.after_note_3: The seller's old QR code will be invalidated
ResaleCheckout.after_note_4: You can view provenance after the transaction is complete
ResaleCheckout.confirm_info: I confirm I have checked the resale ticket information correctly
ResaleCheckout.confirm_ownership: I understand that after the transaction is complete, ownership will transfer to my account
ResaleCheckout.confirm_terms: I agree with the transaction terms and support policy
ResaleCheckout.safety_3: Seller's old QR code is invalidated
ResaleCheckout.error_fullname_invalid: Full name must be at least 2 characters

MyTickets.page_subtitle: Manage purchased tickets, track issuance status and your ticket ownership.
MyTickets.wallet_sub: 1 custodial wallet linked to your account
MyTickets.empty_title: You don't have any tickets yet
MyTickets.empty_subtitle: After successful payment, your tickets will appear here for tracking and usage.
MyTickets.ticket_list_desc: Each ticket has its own code, QR, and is independently verified at check-in.
MyTickets.minting_sub: Ticket paid. System is minting NFT in background.
MyTickets.on_sale_sub: Ticket is listed for resale. QR temporarily locked.
MyTickets.qr_locked_message: QR is currently unavailable while the ticket is listed.
MyTickets.qr_security_note: Please show this code to the staff at the check-in gate. The QR code will automatically refresh for security.

Provenance.page_subtitle: Verify the origin and ownership history of your ticket
Provenance.error_desc: The system is temporarily unable to sync verification data from the blockchain. Please try again later.
Provenance.ownership_history_desc: Track key milestones in the life cycle of the ticket.
Provenance.what_is_provenance_desc: Provenance data helps you verify that a ticket is valid, know how it was issued, and track its ownership history transparently throughout its lifetime.
Provenance.event_issued_desc: The system has minted the ticket as an NFT and recorded it on the blockchain.
Provenance.event_primary_issued_desc: Ticket has been successfully ordered and is pending NFT issuance on blockchain.
Provenance.event_ownership_assigned_desc: The ticket is linked to the custodial wallet of the current account.
Provenance.event_resold_desc: The ticket has been listed on the secondary market. The QR code is temporarily locked.
Provenance.event_transferred_desc: The resale transaction is completed and ticket ownership is transferred immediately.
Provenance.event_used_desc: The ticket was authenticated at the gate and cannot be used again.
Provenance.help_verify_desc: The data below helps you verify that the ticket is valid and implicitly transparently track its history.

Admin.search_placeholder: Search accounts, events, transactions, ticket codes...
Admin.overview_subtitle: Monitor operations, finance and platform-wide alerts
Admin.accounts_subtitle: Manage buyers, organizers, verification status and platform health
Admin.search_accounts_placeholder: Search by name, email, phone, organization...
Admin.moderation_subtitle: Approve new events, control content and assess risk levels
Admin.support_subtitle: Find transactions, tickets and support cases across the platform
Admin.quick_search_label: Quick lookup - order ID, payment ID, ticket ID, email, phone, event name
Admin.tip_order_ticket: Search by order or ticket ID
Admin.tip_order_ticket_desc: ORD-* for transactions, TIX-* for tickets, CASE-^ for support cases.
Admin.tip_email_phone_desc: The system groups all transactions/tickets/cases for the same buyer.
Admin.anomaly_payment_mint_desc: Minting is stuck in relayer queue, open transaction to retry.
Admin.anomaly_email_not_received_desc: Check ticket status, domain might be blocked by provider.
Admin.anomaly_resale_200_desc: Abnormal price increase, need to escalate to Resale Governance.
Admin.health_subtitle: Monitor service health, queue load, latency and operational alerts
Admin.audit_subtitle: Track internal actions, configuration changes and sensitive operations
Admin.audit_banner_text: Audit logs are append-only. Sensitive actions are highlighted. Failed actions require manual follow-up when necessary.
Admin.search_logs_placeholder: Search by admin, action, target ID...
Admin.blockchain_subtitle: Monitor minting pipeline, on-chain / off-chain synchronization and relayer status
Admin.resale_subtitle: Monitor resale activity, check abnormal listings and manage resale exceptions
Admin.price_cap_info: Listings exceeding the price cap are automatically moved to 'Listings Review'.
Admin.settings_subtitle: Manage global parameters, payment integrations and platform operation config
Admin.roles_subtitle: Manage internal roles, permission scope and admin access control
Admin.aikb_subtitle: Manage AI knowledge, content versions and usage quality

aikb_sub.convention_desc: Items <0>Published</0> are directly used by AI. <1>Draft</1> and <2>Needs Review</2> are not active. Low confidence topics should be reviewed. <3>Disabled</3> items are kept in history but not served.
aikb_sub.search_placeholder: Search by title, ID or category
aikb_sub.no_summary: Summary not updated for this item.
aikb_sub.internal_note_placeholder: Internal notes or reason for change...
aikb_sub.select_to_view: Select a knowledge item to view details

support_sub.tip_anomaly_desc: Payment Success but Mint Failed -> open transaction to check queue.
support_sub.tip_rules_desc: Account and event context accessible via ADM-07, not ADM-04.

header.search_placeholder: Search accounts, events, transactions, ticket codes...

common.select_to_view: Select an item to view details

alert_items.gas_low_desc: Relayer balance only 0.42 ETH — risk of stopping mint in 2 hours.
alert_items.latency_high_desc: API Gateway p95 reached 480ms (300ms threshold) in the last 12 minutes.
alert_items.payout_delayed_desc: Payout batch #PB-2604 for 14 organizations is delayed relative to the 60min SLA.
alert_items.resale_anomaly_desc: 3 resale transactions with price increase > 220% from original face value.

settings_sub.change_history_desc: All configuration changes are recorded in the audit log with before/after.
settings_sub.audit_logs_cta_title: View audit logs for recent config changes.
settings_sub.platform_name_sub: Displayed on platform header and system emails.
settings_sub.environment_sub: Current environment config, cannot be changed here.
settings_sub.maintenance_mode_sub: Suspend ticket purchases and resale, show maintenance page.
settings_sub.ai_assistant_sub: Enable AI assistant support in user app.
settings_sub.support_email_sub: Displayed in support emails and platform footer.
settings_sub.platform_fee_sub: Applied to each successful ticket purchase.
settings_sub.royalty_sub: Applied to each resale, paid to organizers.
settings_sub.resale_cap_sub: Max resale price relative to original. 110 = 110%.
settings_sub.fallback_rules_sub: Applied when external marketplace is unavailable.

roles_sub.role_desc_super_admin: Full administrative control of the EvoTicket platform, including config and permissions.
roles_sub.role_desc_ops_admin: General operational administration, excluding config and permissions.
roles_sub.role_desc_finance_admin: Financial administration, reconciliation, and sensitive reporting.
roles_sub.role_desc_moderation_admin: Responsible for event moderation and handling content violations.
roles_sub.role_desc_blockchain_ops: Operate mint pipeline, on-chain sync, and technical resale exceptions.
roles_sub.role_desc_support_admin: Lookup transactions, tickets, support cases, and handle user requests.

Chatbot.empty_state: No messages yet. Start a conversation!
Chatbot.error_login_required: Please login to use the chatbot

ResellTicket.header_subtitle: List your ticket on EvoTicket's official secondary marketplace.
ResellTicket.header_note: All resale transactions must comply with the system's price cap and conditions.
ResellTicket.price_setting_subtitle: Enter the price you want to list. The price must comply with the system's cap.
ResellTicket.revenue_note: The actual net amount will be transferred after the resale transaction is successfully completed. Platform fees apply to operate a transparent and secure resale marketplace.
ResellTicket.note_1: Tickets can only be resold while valid, unused, and before the event ends
ResellTicket.note_2: Once listed, the QR code will be locked
ResellTicket.note_3: You can cancel the listing if no buyer has purchased yet
ResellTicket.note_4: Resale tickets will be authenticated and ownership transferred transparently in the system
ResellTicket.submit_error: An error occurred while submitting the listing request
ResellTicket.not_allowed: This ticket currently does not support resale

ResaleDetail.page_subtitle: View official resale ticket details before proceeding to purchase.
ResaleDetail.official_verified_note: Tickets are verified and traded through EvoTicket's official resale marketplace.
ResaleDetail.unavailable_title: Resale ticket is no longer available
ResaleDetail.unavailable_subtitle: This listing has either been sold or removed from the marketplace. Please return to view other resale tickets.
ResaleDetail.verified_marketplace_note: You are viewing a verified resale ticket listing in EvoTicket's official marketplace.
ResaleDetail.ticket_source_value: Ticket minted and recorded in the system
ResaleDetail.ownership_status_value: Will be transferred to you after transaction completes
ResaleDetail.verification_desc: EvoTicket verifies resale ticket origins and ensures transparent ownership updates after successful payment.
ResaleDetail.valid_price_note: Valid price according to resale regulations
ResaleDetail.anti_speculation_note: This listing price has been checked against the system's anti-speculation rules.
ResaleDetail.final_price_note: Final price may include additional fees at the payment step.
ResaleDetail.after_purchase_1: Payment will be made through a secure payment gateway
ResaleDetail.after_purchase_2: Ticket ownership will be transferred to your account immediately after transaction completes
ResaleDetail.after_purchase_3: Seller's old QR code will no longer be valid
ResaleDetail.after_purchase_4: Ticket will appear in your Ticket Wallet for tracking and use
ResaleDetail.resale_note_1: This is an official resale transaction within the EvoTicket system
ResaleDetail.resale_note_2: Resale tickets are verified before being displayed on the marketplace
ResaleDetail.resale_note_3: After payment, ownership is updated immediately in the system
ResaleDetail.resale_note_4: If you need support, please contact the Help Center
